title: DAVID Deep Dive вҖ” Proto-Indo-European: The Mother Tongue

shots.speech_text: Six thousand years ago, one language split into hundreds. We never wrote it down. But its echo is still in your mouth every time you say sheep, mother, or three.

shots.speech_text: Proto-Indo-European is not a lost manuscript. It's a hypothesis built from daughter languages вҖ” Sanskrit, Greek, Latin, Old English, and dozens more.

shots.video_prompt: Host speaks with calm honesty about absence of attestation, on-screen NOT ATTESTED feel, documentary authority. mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: There is no recording. No native speaker. Every PIE word you hear carries an asterisk вҖ” the scholarly mark for reconstruction.
shots.on_screen: NO AUDIO В· NO ATTESTED TEXT

shots.speech_text: In 1868 August Schleicher wrote a little fable in reconstructed PIE вҖ” a sheep and some horses on a journey. It's our standard teaching excerpt.

shots.speech_text: The word for sheep: Latin ovis, Sanskrit ГЎvi-, English ewe вҖ” all point backward to a reconstructed root *hвӮӮГ©wis.

shots.video_prompt: Host introduces laryngeal theory symbols, honest uncertainty, educational documentary tone. mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: Those h-with-subscript symbols? Laryngeals вҖ” consonants we infer never left a direct letter, only shadows in daughter languages.

shots.video_prompt: Host explains comparative method, gestures toward multilingual manuscripts, measured gravitas. mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: We line up related words across languages, find the sound laws that changed them, and reconstruct the parent form that best explains the pattern.
shots.on_screen: Comparative method В· work backward from daughters

shots.video_prompt: Host discusses Sanskrit role in IE studies, warm lamp light, scholarly tone. mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: Sanskrit often preserves archaic features вҖ” which is why nineteenth-century scholars turned to India to crack the Indo-European puzzle.

shots.speech_text: From one ancestor: Germanic, Italic, Celtic, Slavic, Indo-Iranian, and more вҖ” a family tree you can still hear in grammar and vocabulary.

shots.video_prompt: Host states honesty principle, direct eye contact, documentary trust signal. mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: This is rigorous inference, not time travel. DAVID always labels reconstructed forms вҖ” because intellectual honesty is the whole point.

shots.video_prompt: Host acknowledges scholarly debate, measured pace, no false certainty. mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas synthetic host only
shots.speech_text: Phonologists still argue details вҖ” which laryngeal where, what accent, which dialect stage. Reconstruction is a living science.
